# Runtime Third-Party Assets

This directory contains only third-party assets referenced by runtime scenes or runtime model helpers.
Complete downloaded packs are preserved under `source_assets/third_party_packs/` and ignored by Godot.

## Kenney

The models under `kenney/fantasy_town/` come from Kenney's Fantasy Town Kit.
Their shared `Textures/colormap.png` dependency is retained beside them.
The original CC0 license is preserved at `kenney/LICENSE.txt`.

## Poly Pizza

The wizard model and its texture are preserved under `polypizza/` using the filenames found in the original project.
The complete original local asset folder is retained under `source_assets/third_party_packs/polypizza/`.

## Animated Seal

The animated seal is preserved under `seal/` using the filename found in the original project.
The original local file is retained under `source_assets/third_party_packs/`.
